name: generate_transform_url
description: Generate a Cloudinary delivery URL with on-the-fly transformations. Apply resize, crop, format conversion, quality optimization, and visual effects by constructing the URL with transformation parameters.

parameters.name: public_id
parameters.description: The public ID of the asset to transform.

parameters.name: crop
parameters.description: Crop mode: fill, fit, scale, crop, thumb, pad, limit.

parameters.name: gravity
parameters.description: Gravity for cropping: auto, face, center, north, south, east, west.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format: jpg, png, webp, avif, auto.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: Compression quality: 1-100, or 'auto' for automatic optimization.

parameters.name: effect
parameters.description: Visual effect to apply: blur, grayscale, sepia, sharpen, etc.

body.note: Returns the transformed image binary. The URL itself is the deliverable asset URL. No JSON response -- the transformed image is served directly.
